name: Mother's Filled Butter Rings (Christmas)
recipeIngredient: Apricot preserves or other-flavor of your choice.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light.
2. Add flour, salt, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Chill slightly and roll out dough to 1/8 inch thickness between wax paper sheets.
4. Roll only a small amount of dough at a time.
5. Using a 2 1/2-inch cookie cutter, cut out cookies.
6. Cut the center out of half of the cookies using your thimble as a guide.
7. Bake all cookies on ungreased baking sheets at 400°F for 8-10 minutes or less until very lightly browned.
8. Cool cookies on wire racks.
9. Spread whole cookies with preserves, piling higher in the center.
10. Top each filled cookie with a cookie ring.
11. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top of the rings.
12. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper.
